title: Welcome!
text:
Portrait photographed by Dustin Angell





My name is Jenna Baljunas, and I study community ecology!

Currently, I am a PhD student in the Spatial and Community Ecology (SpaCE) Lab at Michigan State University and a part of the Department of Integrative Biology and Ecology, Evolution, and Behavior program.

  
  






I am interested in how species interact with each other and the environment around them.




My research explores the drivers of community change across spatial and temporal scales. I enjoy working with multiple taxonomic groups and
